[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010000 1
1 0110000 2
2 1000011 3
3 0000010 1
4 1001010 3
5 0110100 3
6 1101101 5
7 1001100 3

01 10 1000000 1

23 32 0100010 2

56 65 0000000 a
67 76 0100100 2
70 07 1001100 3 match 7
